title: Evaluation of analytical particle deposition models against experimental mouse lung data — reproduction code
description: Minimum reproducible code for the manuscript "Evaluation of analytical particle deposition models against experimental mouse lung data". It reproduces the paper's main-text figures and numeric results from the LAPDMouse dataset using a Markov-chain particle-deposition model (three impaction kernels, a piecewise flow split, and TLC-to-tidal geometry scaling). See the repository README for setup, the single reproduction command, and a figure-to-paper map.
